title: Project Teacher
description: Scan the active project and teach any concept, code path, or decision using verified information, interactive questions, and simple explanations. Trigger: user asks to explain, understand, clarify, or learn about anything in the project or codebase.

skillMetadata.author: skilly-hand
skillMetadata.changelog: Initial release of project-teacher skill; provides interactive, project-grounded teaching for any concept or code path; affects education and clarification workflows across all projects
skillMetadata.auto-invoke: User needs to understand, explain, or learn about any aspect of the project or codebase
